hooks.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));const f=d.tool_input?.file_path||d.tool_response?.filePath||'';if(!/\.(mdx|astro|css|ts)$/.test(f)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({suppressOutput:true}));process.exit(1)}" && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -20 || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"'"$(git pull --ff-only 2>&1 | tail -3 | tr '\n' ' ')"' | Git status: '"$(git status --short | head -10 | tr '\n' ' ')"'"}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"Preserve: which user mode (author/developer), what content or feature is being worked on, any uncommitted changes or pending tasks, and the current git branch."}}'
